title: Product sync — 2026-04-08
text:
# Weekly Product Sync — 2026-04-08
Attendees: PM, Eng Lead, CS Lead

## Discussion
- Peak Outfitters escalated Mobile App problems again; churn risk flagged.
- Repeated ask for 'CSV export of raw data' across accounts.
- Eng notes Mobile App generates the most support load this month.

## Action items
- [ ] Evaluate 'CSV export of raw data' for roadmap.
- [ ] Investigate Mobile App performance regressions.
- [ ] Follow up with Peak Outfitters.
